description: Calibration fixture for Qwen3.6-27B dense hybrid DeltaNet on Rapid-MLX.

test_cases.measurement_command: cd ~/.rapid-mlx && RAPID_MLX_METRICS=1 python -m vllm_mlx.serve --model mlx-community/Qwen3-27B-4bit --kv-cache-dtype int4 --max-model-len 16384 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 2>&1 | tee run.log; lsof -n -P -p $(pgrep -f Qwen3-27B) | grep -i memory
test_cases.hardware: Apple M5 Max, 128 GB unified memory, macOS 26.0

error_bounds.notes: KV estimate uses formula from GGUF metadata (n_attn_layers=16). Overhead calibrated on M5 Max with 8% MLX KV fraction pending larger-sample calibration.

test_cases.measurement_command: cd ~/.rapid-mlx && RAPID_MLX_METRICS=1 python -m vllm_mlx.serve --model mlx-community/Qwen3-27B-4bit --kv-cache-dtype int8 --max-model-len 16384 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 2>&1 | tee run.log; lsof -n -P -p $(pgrep -f Qwen3-27B) | grep -i memory
test_cases.hardware: Apple M5 Max, 128 GB unified memory, macOS 26.0

error_bounds.notes: int8 KV doubles KV cache size vs int4. Overhead scales with 8% of KV.

test_cases.measurement_command: cd ~/.rapid-mlx && RAPID_MLX_METRICS=1 python -m vllm_mlx.serve --model mlx-community/Qwen3-27B-4bit --kv-cache-dtype int4 --max-model-len 131072 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 2>&1 | tee run.log; lsof -n -P -p $(pgrep -f Qwen3-27B) | grep -i memory
test_cases.hardware: Apple M5 Max, 128 GB unified memory, macOS 26.0

error_bounds.notes: At 128K context, KV dominates. Only n_attn_layers=16 store KV (hybrid DeltaNet). This is the key calibration point for Qwen3.6 scaling.

cross_surface_equality_check.description: For each test_case, wizard/preset/setup-view/models surfaces must show identical MemoryBreakdown when called with matching parameters.
cross_surface_equality_check.verification: Run /api/vram-estimate with identical body for each scenario; diff active_kv_bytes, retained_kv_bytes, total_bytes across all surfaces.
